matches.match_rationale: Multi-step reactive workflow spanning allocation rules, transfer governance, duplicate detection.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An automated pipeline that queries SIS/LMS data for eligibility conditions, flags violations, and calculates claw-back treatment per sponsor agreement.

matches.match_rationale: Each student-award combination is a structured record that needs to be labeled eligible, at-risk, or ineligible.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A classification model scoring each active award holder at each verification checkpoint.

matches.match_rationale: A propensity model predicts likelihood of condition breach 4-6 weeks in advance for early intervention.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An early-warning scoring system ranking active award holders by probability of eligibility breach.

matches.match_rationale: Each claw-back event requires sponsor notification letters and student communications.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A document generation layer producing sponsor notification letters and student-facing claw-back explanations.

matches.match_rationale: Sponsor agreements specify conditions in varied formats that need to be normalized into a structured eligibility rules engine.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A transformation pipeline converting sponsor agreement terms into a canonical rules table.
